overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rainy neon-lit highway at night through open road sections, curved exit ramps, and enclosed tunnels lined with cyberpunk billboards. The vehicle maintains high speed while following sparse traffic through the wet, atmospheric urban environment.

agents.ego_description: driving straight on multi-lane highway, maintaining steady speed behind traffic

notable_agents.action: sedan traveling in same lane ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road
tall concrete divider separating highway lanes
tall pole with dual street lamps illuminating the road
rain-slicked road surface with reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night, passing under concrete overpasses. Street lamps cast yellow-orange light onto the wet asphalt while sparse traffic moves ahead. The environment is open with partial sky visibility between overpass structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway exit ramp with concrete retaining walls

events.description: vehicle takes exit ramp and begins curving to the right
transition from open highway to enclosed ramp structure with walls

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved exit ramp while closely following a green sedan

notable_agents.action: green sedan being followed closely around the curve

entered.detail: concrete barrier wall lining the left side of the curved ramp
tall vertical concrete wall on the right side of the ramp
dark opening of enclosed tunnel section ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the main highway onto a curved ramp, following a green sedan through a semi-enclosed concrete corridor. The environment becomes more sheltered from the rain as concrete walls rise on both sides, leading toward a tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway tunnel with illuminated cyberpunk billboards

events.description: entering fully enclosed tunnel section with concrete walls and ceiling
passing illuminated billboard creates brief bright light reflection

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel section, maintaining speed along curved path

entered.detail: rough concrete walls enclosing both sides of the highway
solid concrete ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures
large glowing advertisement displays including 'EL CUERVO' and 'REAL WATER'
painted red lines along the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a fully enclosed tunnel section, shielded from the rain by concrete walls and ceiling. Illuminated cyberpunk billboards line the left wall, casting colorful light onto the wet road. The environment is artificially lit with red curb markings visible along the road edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway emerging from tunnel into rainy night

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open air with visible rain and sky
ambient lighting shifts from artificial tunnel lights to mixed street lighting

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway after exiting the tunnel, navigating light traffic

notable_agents.action: sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: expansive open road with visible horizon and city lights in distance
tall street lamps resuming along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into the open night air, where heavy rain is visible against the sky. Street lights resume along the highway as the vehicle accelerates, passing under distant overpasses. A sports car overtakes on the right as the environment opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane highway with distant urban skyline

events.description: approaching and passing highway signage indicating directions

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on open highway, navigating through light rain

entered.detail: glowing skyline and building lights visible on the horizon
overhead directional signs spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the open highway through the rainy night, with distant city lights visible on the horizon. Highway signs appear overhead indicating directions. The road stretches ahead with wet reflective surfaces and sparse traffic, maintaining the cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from an open, rain-soaked highway into a sheltered, neon-lit urban tunnel. It begins on a multi-lane road under concrete overpasses, where yellow-orange street lamps reflect off the wet asphalt amidst sparse traffic. As the vehicle steers away from the main road, the scene shifts onto a curved exit ramp, following a green sedan into a semi-enclosed concrete corridor that begins to shield the car from the rain. The environment then tightens as the camera enters a fully enclosed tunnel, replacing the open sky with a concrete ceiling and artificial lighting. Finally, the view is dominated by colorful cyberpunk billboards lining the walls and red curb markings that glow against the damp road surface.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from the enclosure of a tunnel into the expansive, rain-soaked openness of a neon-lit highway. It begins as the vehicle emerges from the tunnel into the night air, where heavy rain falls against the sky and street lights reappear along the roadside. As the vehicle accelerates under distant overpasses, the environment opens up and a sports car quickly overtakes on the right. The scene then expands further along the wet, reflective highway, passing under overhead directional signs while the distant city lights shimmer on the horizon. Finally, the road stretches forward through the sparse traffic, maintaining a moody, atmospheric urban glow.
